endpoints.name: GET /subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/providers/Microsoft.Network/ServiceEndpointPolicies
endpoints.description: Gets all the service endpoint policies in a subscription.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid.

endpoints.name: GET /subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/resourceGroups/{resourceGroupName}/providers/Microsoft.Network/serviceEndpointPolicies
endpoints.description: Gets all service endpoint Policies in a resource group.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{RESOURCEGROUPNAME}} with a real resourcegroupname.

endpoints.name: GET /subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/resourceGroups/{resourceGroupName}/providers/Microsoft.Network/serviceEndpointPolicies/{serviceEndpointPolicyName}
endpoints.description: Gets the specified service Endpoint Policies in a specified resource group.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{SERVICEENDPOINTPOLICYNAME}} with a real serviceendpointpolicyname. Replace {{RESOURCEGROUPNAME}} with a real resourcegroupname.

endpoints.name: PUT /subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/resourceGroups/{resourceGroupName}/providers/Microsoft.Network/serviceEndpointPolicies/{serviceEndpointPolicyName}
endpoints.description: Creates or updates a service Endpoint Policies.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{SERVICEENDPOINTPOLICYNAME}} with a real serviceendpointpolicyname. Replace {{RESOURCEGROUPNAME}} with a real resourcegroupname.

endpoints.name: DELETE /subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/resourceGroups/{resourceGroupName}/providers/Microsoft.Network/serviceEndpointPolicies/{serviceEndpointPolicyName}
endpoints.description: Deletes the specified service endpoint policy.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{SERVICEENDPOINTPOLICYNAME}} with a real serviceendpointpolicyname. Replace {{RESOURCEGROUPNAME}} with a real resourcegroupname.

endpoints.name: PATCH /subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/resourceGroups/{resourceGroupName}/providers/Microsoft.Network/serviceEndpointPolicies/{serviceEndpointPolicyName}
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{SERVICEENDPOINTPOLICYNAME}} with a real serviceendpointpolicyname. Replace {{RESOURCEGROUPNAME}} with a real resourcegroupname.
